message:
Fix sensitive value masking to handle quoted strings and add test coverage

- Rewrite mask_sensitive_command value boundary detection with a
  quote-aware parser (find_value_end) that tracks single/double quote
  state and backslash escapes, correctly masking values like
  TOKEN="my super secret" as a single unit instead of stopping at the
  first internal space
- Add test for quoted value masking to verify secrets inside quotes
  are fully redacted

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
